campaign_title: The Fabrial Hunt — The Witness Arc

world.name: Forgotten Realms (Post-Calamity)
world.lore_summary: Six ancient Fabrials were created as a lock against the Void-That-Thirsts (Keth'zahir). 347 years ago, Karsus shattered that lock and the entity fed on the imbalance. Now Kél Stormblessed—a blind Divination Wizard—has become the seventh point of the hexagonal cage, containing the entity within himself. The Verdant Fabrial has fallen. Four points remain. The entity sleeps—but not for long.

npcs.name: Mira Ashvale
npcs.role: Eighth of the Cognoscenti, romantic partner
npcs.notes: Dark hair with gold threads from speaking the Immortal Words. Bound to Fen (creation essence). Held Kél through the night. Her belief in him is becoming a tether against despair. Said: "I see you. All of you. Even the broken parts."

npcs.name: Thorin Ironforge
npcs.role: Dwarf warrior and antiquarian, party anchor
npcs.notes: Red braided beard, chainmail, lightning-bolt hammer, stormcloud shield. 40 years studying old things. Published monograph on pre-Calamity binding techniques. Communicates primarily through "Hm" (which contains multitudes).

npcs.name: Elder Monk
npcs.role: Monastery leader, keeper of Fabrial knowledge
npcs.notes: Recognized Kél on sight as "the Stormblessed" and "the blind one who paid the price." Said: "You are both cage and caged. The seventh point of a six-pointed binding. Something the world has never needed before."

npcs.name: Wren
npcs.notes: Compact, sharp-faced, dark circles under eyes. 11 years tracking experience. Lost someone named Cael. Notices exits, not threats. Witnessed Davan's shadow encounter.

npcs.name: Aldric
npcs.notes: About 20 years old. Brown hair, recent scab above eyebrow. Cuts straight to the center of complicated questions. Said "Somewhere to send everything" about the Unnamed—earned Kél's deep respect.

npcs.name: Serath
npcs.notes: 31 years following the Fabrial thread. Silver-streaked hair, sharp featured. Originally from Waterdeep. Travels with Pip and Davan.

npcs.name: Pip
npcs.notes: Young woman, dark eyes behind simple spectacles. Ink-stained fingers, constant journal-keeper. Has read everything about Kél including Thornwall.

npcs.name: Davan
npcs.notes: Quiet, dark-eyed, watchful. Spent 7 years searching for a shadow from an abandoned village. Bonded with a shadow in the valley—remembered "someone."

npcs.name: Asha — The Architect
npcs.notes: Founded the Cognoscenti. Was human originally—now exists at a coordinate in time rather than moving through it. Bare collar where a brooch once was. Karsus was her brightest student. Appears only as an echo/projection.

npcs.name: Syl
npcs.notes: Originally a dark candle-like void essence. Now: ethereal fae-like form, tiny luminous woman, translucent flowy dress. Rests on Kél's left shoulder. Speaks Ancient Netherese. Currently dimmed from the entity's touch but recovering.

npcs.name: Kess
npcs.role: Captain of local militia near Verdant Hollow
npcs.notes: Warned the party about the Architects of Want before the catastrophe at Verdant.

quests.title: Secure the Remaining Fabrial Points
quests.description: Four Fabrials remain unsealed. If another falls before the hexagon is secured, the Void-That-Thirsts will feed again—and Kél will be the first thing it unmakes.

steps.description: Reach the Deepwater Fabrial (South — at or near the Monastery)
Understand what securing the seventh point (center) requires
Confront the surviving Architects of Want in the western passes

quests.title: Survive the Darkness
quests.description: Kél is blind, containing an ancient entity, and drowning in despair after failing at Verdant Hollow. He must learn to live with what he carries before the entity wakes.

steps.description: Learn to navigate the world through energy perception
Work through the severe depression and self-recrimination
Accept the weight of being cage and caged both

quests.title: Learn What the Monastery Knows
quests.description: The elder monks have tended six points of binding for 347 years and know things no one else does.

steps.description: Hear the elder's full account of the Void-That-Thirsts
Understand what being the seventh point means in practice
Determine whether the Verdant point can be restored or replaced

history_log.event: Campaign imported from Markdown. Title: "The Fabrial Hunt — The Witness Arc". Character: Kél Stormblessed, Wizard (Divination (School of Divination)) Level 6.
